data.title: Bitcoin To Hit $73K On Election Day And $80K If Trump Wins, Says Standard Chartered
data.description: Standard Chartered has predicted that Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) will hit $73,000 by the time of the U.S. presidential election on Nov.

data.title: Visa Teams Up With USAID To Boost Digital Government Platforms In Sub-Saharan Africa And Beyond
data.description: Visa and USAID collaborate to enhance global access to secure and inclusive digital government systems, promoting economic development and financial inclusion.

data.title: IBM Posts Mixed Q3 Results, These Analysts Differ On Prospects
data.description: IBM reported third-quarter revenues of $15 billion, short of expectations, "as Infra (6% miss) and Consulting (1% miss) underperformed.

data.title: What's Going On With Meta Platforms Stock Ahead Of Q3 Earnings?
data.description: Meta Platforms Inc (NASDAQ:META) shares are up nearly 25% over the past quarter. The company is gearing up to report earnings again next week. Here's a look at what you need to know ahead of the report.

data.title: Monopar Therapeutics Stock Jumps 4X, Inks Licensing Pact With AstraZeneca For Once Terminated Phase 3 Candidate For Rare Genetic Disorder
data.description: Monopar secures an exclusive license from AstraZeneca's Alexion for ALXN-1840, aiming to advance treatment for Wilson's disease, a rare genetic disorder.
